_note: Layer 2 calculation from this article, for the central process to merge into data/stat_bank.json. This subagent does NOT edit data/stat_bank.json directly.
stat: Share of all UK businesses using generative/text-generation AI vs agentic AI, derived from DSIT adoption rates
unit: percent of all UK businesses (approx. 12x gap)
applies_to: clusters: Technical & Build; Tools & emerging vocabulary; Strategy & ROI
method: Recipe C — share-of-all-firms cut derived from a single primary snapshot (DSIT) that the source did not publish in this form

sources_used.title: AI Adoption Research
sources_used.publisher: Department for Science, Innovation and Technology (DSIT)

workings: DSIT (published 13 Feb 2026): 16% of all UK businesses use at least one AI technology; among adopters, 85% use text generation and 7% use agentic AI. Share of ALL UK businesses using text generation = 0.16 x 0.85 = 0.136 = 13.6%. Share using agentic AI = 0.16 x 0.07 = 0.0112 = ~1.1%. Ratio = 85/7 = ~12.1x (holds across all firms as the 16% base cancels). Result: generative/text-generation AI reaches ~13.6% of all UK businesses vs ~1.1% for agentic AI, a ~12x gap.
